questionHtml:
Which element has the same oxidation number in both species?

A.     C in C2H4 and CO2

B.     H in H2O and NaH

C.     S in SO42−and SO3

D.     O in H2O2 and H2O

meta.title: Which element has the same oxidation number in both species? A. C in C2H4 and CO2 B. H in H2O and NaH C. S in SO42−and SO3 D. O in H2O2 and H2O
